message:
test(search): add comprehensive thread-safety tests for TwoTierBridge

Add stress tests for concurrent initialization:
- get_or_init_two_tier_bridge_cached_access_is_fast: verifies 1000 cached accesses <10ms
- get_or_init_two_tier_bridge_stress_100_threads: 100-thread stress test

Covers TC4 and TC7 from br-2tnl.5.10.4 test requirements.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
